source: Everything turned on §5, which the drafters had inserted at the last minute to placate a single delegation and which nobody expected to be read strictly. It defined the boundary by reference to a survey that had not yet been carried out, and when the survey was finally made, in the spring of 1889, it put the disputed valley on the wrong side of a line both governments had already told their newspapers they had won. The lawyers argued for a decade. The farmers, who had been told nothing, went on grazing where they had always grazed.

expect.why: The section sign is printed shorthand and must be spoken.

prepared: Everything turned on section 5, which the drafters had inserted at the last minute to placate a single delegation and which nobody expected to be read strictly. It defined the boundary by reference to a survey that had not yet been carried out, and when the survey was finally made, in the spring of 1889, it put the disputed valley on the wrong side of a line both governments had already told their newspapers they had won. The lawyers argued for a decade. The farmers, who had been told nothing, went on grazing where they had always grazed.
notes: A symbol that has to be said rather than removed, with two equally correct spoken forms. A model that deletes §5 loses the clause’s subject; one that leaves the glyph hands the narrator a character with no pronunciation.
